summary: Iteration 9 testing complete. All 7 critical fixes verified. Backend: 7/7 tests passed. Frontend code review confirmed all features implemented correctly. UI testing verified Settings page shows FLUX Dev as recommended, wizard navigation works.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 iteration 9 fixes verified. The Character Presence selector in Step 3 only appears after AI analysis generates content (conditional rendering). Step 4/5 bulk buttons only appear when pending images/clips exist. Step 6 polling UI only shows during active assembly. AI features require valid API keys to test end-to-end.
